name: Henan Lingrui Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Lingrui Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. produces and sells medicines in China. The company offers its products in ten dosage forms, such as adhesive plasters, tablets, capsules, granules, tinctures, etc. covering approximately 100 product varieties. Its products include Tongluoqutong plasters, Peiyuantongnao capsules, Danlutongdu tablets, stomachache free tablets, Shenqi Hypoglycemic capsules, and others. Henan Lingrui Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Xinyang, China.
